text:
{
  "title": "Financial Accounting Exam",
   "description": "This exam covers financial statement preparation and analysis.",
   "timeLimit": 120,
   "passingScore": 50,
   "sections": [
       {
           "name": "A",
           "title": "Financial Statement Preparation (40 Marks)",
           "description": "Prepare financial statements based on the given trial balance.",
           "passage": "Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd as at 31 December 2025\nAccount\tDebit (RWF)\tCredit (RWF)\nCash\t5,000,000\t\nAccounts Receivable\t3,000,000\t\nInventory (Opening)\t4,000,000\t\nEquipment\t12,000,000\t\nAccounts Payable\t\t2,500,000\nShare Capital\t\t15,000,000\nSales Revenue\t\t20,000,000\nPurchases\t10,000,000\t\nSalaries Expense\t2,000,000\t\nRent Expense\t1,000,000\t\nAccumulated Depreciation\t2,000,000\t\nTotals\t37,000,000\t37,000,000\nAdditional Information:\nClosing Inventory = RWF 5,000,000\nDepreciation on Equipment = RWF 1,200,000\nOutstanding Salaries = RWF 500,000",
           "questions": [
               {
                   "questionNumber": 1,
                   "text": "Prepare:\na) Income Statement\nb) Statement of Financial Position",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "subQuestions": [
                       {
                           "label": "a)",
                           "text": "Income Statement for Year Ended 31 December 2025",
                           "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                           "points": 10,
                           "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                               "Sales Revenue": 20000000,
                               "Cost of Goods Sold": 0,
                               "Gross Profit": 0,
                               "Salaries Expense": 0,
                               "Rent Expense": 0,
                               "Depreciation": 0,
                               "Net Profit": 0
                           },
                           "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                               "Sales Revenue": 20000000,
                               "Cost of Goods Sold": 9000000,
                               "Gross Profit": 11000000,
                               "Salaries Expense": 2500000,
                               "Rent Expense": 1000000,
                               "Depreciation": 1200000,
                               "Net Profit": 6300000
                           },
                           "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
                       },
                       {
                           "label": "b)",
                           "text": "Statement of Financial Position",
                           "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                           "points": 10,
                           "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                               "Cash": 5000000,
                               "Accounts Receivable": 3000000,
                               "Inventory": 0,
                               "Equipment": 12000000,
                               "Accumulated Depreciation": 3200000,
                               "Total Assets": 0,
                               "Share Capital": 15000000,
                               "Retained Earnings": 0,
                               "Total Equity": 0,
                               "Accounts Payable": 2500000,
                               "Outstanding Salaries": 500000,
                               "Total Liabilities": 0
                           },
                           "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                               "Cash": 5000000,
                               "Accounts Receivable": 3000000,
                               "Inventory": 5000000,
                               "Equipment": 12000000,
                               "Accumulated Depreciation": 3200000,
                               "Total Assets": 21800000,
                               "Share Capital": 15000000,
                               "Retained Earnings": 6300000,
                               "Total Equity": 21300000,
                               "Accounts Payable": 2500000,
                               "Outstanding Salaries": 500000,
                               "Total Liabilities": 3000000
                           },
                           "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
                       }
                   ],
                   "correctAnswer": "See subQuestions"
               }
           ]
       },
       {
           "name": "B",
           "title": "Financial Statement Analysis (30 Marks)",
           "description": "Analyze the financial data of ABC Ltd.",
           "passage": "ABC Ltd Financial Data\nItem\t2024 (RWF)\t2025 (RWF)\nSales\t50000000\t60000000\nNet Profit\t5000000\t7200000\nTotal Assets\t25000000\t30000000\nCurrent Assets\t10000000\t14000000\nCurrent Liabilities\t5000000\t7000000\nEquity\t15000000\t18000000",
           "questions": [
               {
                   "questionNumber": 2,
                   "text": "Calculate:\na) Current Ratio (2025)\nb) Net Profit Margin (2025)\nc) Return on Assets (ROA) (2025)\nd) Debt Ratio (2025)\ne) Percentage Increase in Sales",
                   "type": "short-answer",
                   "points": 15,
                   "subQuestions": [
                       {
                           "label": "a)",
                           "text": "Current Ratio (2025)",
                           "type": "short-answer",
                           "points": 3,
                           "correctAnswer": "2:1"
                       },
                       {
                           "label": "b)",
                           "text": "Net Profit Margin (2025)",
                           "type": "short-answer",
                           "points": 3,
                           "correctAnswer": "12%"
                       },
                       {
                           "label": "c)",
                           "text": "Return on Assets (ROA) (2025)",
                           "type": "short-answer",
                           "points": 3,
                           "correctAnswer": "24%"
                       },
                       {
                           "label": "d)",
                           "text": "Debt Ratio (2025)",
                           "type": "short-answer",
                           "points": 3,
                           "correctAnswer": "40%"
                       },
                       {
                           "label": "e)",
                           "text": "Percentage Increase in Sales",
                           "type": "short-answer",
                           "points": 3,
                           "correctAnswer": "20%"
                       }
                   ],
                   "correctAnswer": "See subQuestions"
               }
           ]
       }
   ]
}

parsedContent.title: Financial Accounting Exam
parsedContent.description: This exam covers financial statement preparation and analysis.

sections.name: A
sections.title: Financial Statement Preparation (40 Marks)
sections.description: Prepare financial statements based on the given trial balance.
sections.passage:
Trial Balance of XYZ Ltd as at 31 December 2025
Account	Debit (RWF)	Credit (RWF)
Cash	5,000,000	
Accounts Receivable	3,000,000	
Inventory (Opening)	4,000,000	
Equipment	12,000,000	
Accounts Payable		2,500,000
Share Capital		15,000,000
Sales Revenue		20,000,000
Purchases	10,000,000	
Salaries Expense	2,000,000	
Rent Expense	1,000,000	
Accumulated Depreciation	2,000,000	
Totals	37,000,000	37,000,000
Additional Information:
Closing Inventory = RWF 5,000,000
Depreciation on Equipment = RWF 1,200,000
Outstanding Salaries = RWF 500,000

questions.text:
Prepare:
a) Income Statement
b) Statement of Financial Position

subQuestions.label: a)
subQuestions.text: Income Statement for Year Ended 31 December 2025

sections.name: B
sections.title: Financial Statement Analysis (30 Marks)
sections.description: Analyze the financial data of ABC Ltd.
sections.passage:
ABC Ltd Financial Data
Item	2024 (RWF)	2025 (RWF)
Sales	50000000	60000000
Net Profit	5000000	7200000
Total Assets	25000000	30000000
Current Assets	10000000	14000000
Current Liabilities	5000000	7000000
Equity	15000000	18000000

questions.text:
Calculate:
a) Current Ratio (2025)
b) Net Profit Margin (2025)
c) Return on Assets (ROA) (2025)
d) Debt Ratio (2025)
e) Percentage Increase in Sales
